title: The Fifth Shot Is the One Nobody Drills: Jilly B's 3.5-to-4.0 Fix
description: A pro-tour pickleball clinic breaks down the first four shots, the "zone of death" behind the baseline, the split-step-and-stop footwork that gets you to the line, and the 60% "drive to survive" that separates a 3.5 from a 4.0-plus.
